endpoint.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent and returns the client secret and publishable key needed by the mobile Stripe SDK.

amount.required: conditional — required unless productId is supplied
amount.description: Payment amount as a decimal (e.g. 12.50 for €12.50). Must be positive and finite. Defaults to product.unitPrice when productId is supplied.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code, lowercase. Defaults to 'eur' if absent.

merchantId.description: ID of the merchant. Used to resolve Stripe credentials (branch-level override > merchant default > global config).

branchId.description: ID of the merchant branch. Optional — server derives from productId context if omitted. Returns 400 if branch cannot be resolved.

productId.description: ID of the product being purchased. If supplied, product.unitPrice is used as the default amount and branch is derived from the product.

paymentIntent.description: Stripe PaymentIntent client_secret. Used by the mobile Stripe SDK to confirm the payment.

publishableKey.description: Stripe publishable key. Safe to expose to clients.

400.description: Invalid request — amount missing/invalid, merchantId missing, or branch cannot be resolved

error.example: amount must be a positive number | merchantId is required | branch cannot be resolved

503.description: No Stripe credentials configured at branch or merchant level

500.description: Stripe API error or server misconfiguration

security.note: Secret key is never returned in any response field. Handled server-side only.
